case_title: JUDITH PISTALU VS. NICOLE ALLEN, et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CO-DEFENDANT PRESENT AND DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO VERONICA ELENA ESTRELLA BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-19-2009 AT 6:30PM.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO VERONICA ESTRELLA.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO VERONICA ESTRELLA.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PISTALU, JUDITH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLEN, NICOLE PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVE THAT DEFENDANT NICOLE ALLEN WAS LIABLE FOR DAMAGES.
